title: Steel Armor Blocks - Proper Item Names!
description: A lang file edit made for the Steel Armor Blocks mod.
body:
An en-us locale edit for the [Steel Armor Blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/steel-armor-blocks) mod. This includes proper capitalization of all items and blocks, aswell as new names for items like the custom armored symbols which were previously all named "letter".

Recommended to be used alongside the [Steel Armor Blocks Recipes: TMFG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/steel-armor-blocks-recipes-tfmg) mod which also adds recipes.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b3f54fbaeae70f7206d1258adb97313041e336.png)
